selectedSlice: Render explicit Users & Access site-selection guidance when school-scoped access management requires choosing a site first.
selectionReason: The protected workspace already had a real /api/site/access-assignments selectionRequired contract with accessibleSites, and multiple other protected sections already reused that response to show school-pick buttons. Reusing the same pattern inside Users & Access was the safest bounded improvement because it fixed a real protected dead end without adding new routes, mutation controls, or RBAC changes.
candidateShortlist: Global Admin route refresh across Audit, Programs, Students, Presentation, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Multi-site Global Admin and site-admin users now get explicit school-pick guidance inside Users & Access when school-scoped access management needs a selected site, instead of seeing a generic protected-workspace dead end.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing /api/site/access-assignments selectionRequired response and accessibleSites payload; it does not add a new data path.
No new mutation control, write path, role, tenant scope, site scope, program scope, or student visibility path was added.
The school-pick guidance preserves explicit user choice rather than silently auto-selecting a site for access-management actions.

validation.notes: git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

deferred: Global Admin route refresh remains broader than this bounded Users & Access slice.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend queue rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
nextRecommended: Inspect a bounded Global Admin route refresh across the existing Audit, Programs, Student Directory, Presentation, recent role assignments, and new access-management site-selection handoff; if that remains too broad, keep Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise scoped destination exists.
doNotRepeat: Do not fall back to a generic API notice for Users & Access when /api/site/access-assignments returns site_selection_required.
Do not silently auto-pick a school for multi-site access-management flows without an explicit site-selection contract.
Do not broaden Site Admin workspaces with the Global Admin-only recent role-assignment disclosure.
